queries.question: For every magazine, show the columns that they have.
queries.sql: select magazines.name , columns.column_name from Magazines_Columns join Columns on Magazines_Columns.column_id = Columns.id join Magazines on Magazines_Columns.magazine_id = Magazines.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?column_name WHERE {
  ?magazines_columns a :Magazines_Columns .
  ?columns a :Columns .
  ?magazines_columns p:hasColumns ?columns .
  ?magazines a :Magazines .
  ?magazines_columns p:hasMagazines ?magazines .
  ?magazines p:name ?name .
  ?columns p:column_name ?column_name .
}

queries.question: Which columns do all magazines have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Columns.column_name  from Magazines_Columns join Columns on Magazines_Columns.column_id = Columns.id join Magazines on Magazines_Columns.magazine_id = Magazines.id   GROUP BY Magazines_Columns.column_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Magazines_Columns.magazine_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Magazines)

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the columns that each magazine has.
